_readme: BRAND TOKENS — the single source of truth for how this product looks.
Same principle as the bank: derived, never duplicated. Every generator reads
this file; nothing hardcodes a hex value. Change a colour here and the site,
the share cards, the practice game, the email (when it exists) and the
calendar pages all move together on the next build.
Still hardcoded and awaiting conversion: landing/privacy.html and
landing/404.html are hand-written rather than generated, so their palettes
must be updated by hand until they become build outputs. Known debt.
name: Un puente al giorno
tagline: One Spanish–Italian expression pair a day — and the exact mistake speakers of one make in the other.
taglineShort: One pair a day, and the trap between them.

rules.esColourOnEsText: Spanish expressions are carmine, Italian laurel — on the expression itself, not just the label. This is the one visual signature that must never drift.
rules.seam: The two languages meet at a vertical rule. The seam is the product.
rules.labels: Language labels are mono, uppercase, letterspaced. Meanings and glosses are sans. Expressions, literals and bridge notes are serif.
rules.colourSchemeLight: Every page declares color-scheme: light — dark-mode browsers otherwise invert into black-on-black.
rules.noThirdPartyAssets: Fonts are self-hosted. No CDN, no tracker, no external request on page load — the privacy page promises this.
rules.letterspacing: Letterspaced text uses the letter-spacing attribute (SVG) or CSS property — NEVER insert spaces between characters. Splitting a string on every character makes word gaps identical to letter gaps, so 'UN PUENTE AL GIORNO' reads as one run. Fixed 2026-07-19 in build-cards and build-brand-assets.

social.ogDescription: One Spanish–Italian expression pair a day — and the exact mistake speakers of one make in the other.
social.handleNote: Same handle on all three, matching the Buttondown slug. Bluesky can later be switched to the custom domain as handle once a domain is chosen. Generators read these rather than hardcoding.
social.avatar: landing/brand/avatar-512.png (1024 also available) — generated by tools/build-brand-assets.mjs
social.ogDefault: landing/brand/og-default.png — generic 1200x630 for pages without an entry card
